title: Metro Rail seeks CCRS approval to relax curbs on Poonamallee-Vadapalani stretch
description: A CMRL official says the frequency between Poonamallee and Porur can be brought down from 15 minutes to 10 minutes if the Chief Commissioner of Railway Safety approves the request; CMRL has also requested for operation of trains at a speed of 40 kmph between Porur and Vadapalani
